name: Pork Chops and Cheesy Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 2 cans cream of mushroom soup (reduced fat)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a 1 1/2 quart buttered dish, layer alternating rows of potatoes, onions, and cheese.
2. Combine the soup, milk, and seasonings in a separate bowl.
3. Pour the mixture over all the layers (do not stir).
4. Place the browned pork chops on top of the casserole.
5. Cover the dish and bake at 350°F for 1 1/2 hours.
